goal: Build a brick-stacking baseplate: Franka picks up bricks one at a time and stacks them in 3-row pyramid pattern on a baseplate. Realizes Phase 10 yrkesroll #20 (construction / DIY persona — toy domain demonstrating sequential task planning).
thoughts: Robot must place bricks in increasing z (3 at z=0.78, 2 at z=0.83, 1 at z=0.88).
drop_targets dict per brick maps to its pyramid position.
Function-gate: top brick (Brick_6) ends at top of pyramid. cube_paths over all 6 bricks.
Sequential placement with cube_paths fix — any brick reaching the top counts as success.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

for i, x in enumerate([0.30, 0.40, 0.50, 0.30, 0.40, 0.50]):
    y = 0.20 if i < 3 else 0.30
    path = f"/World/Brick_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, y, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Baseplate", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.3, 0.2, 0.78], scale=[0.18, 0.06, 0.025])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Baseplate", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.25, 0.835], size=[0.20, 0.20, 0.06])

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path=None,
    source_paths=[f"/World/Brick_{i+1}" for i in range(6)],
    destination_path="/World/Baseplate",
    drop_targets={
        "/World/Brick_1": [-0.34, 0.20, 0.81],
        "/World/Brick_2": [-0.30, 0.20, 0.81],
        "/World/Brick_3": [-0.26, 0.20, 0.81],
        "/World/Brick_4": [-0.32, 0.20, 0.86],
        "/World/Brick_5": [-0.28, 0.20, 0.86],
        "/World/Brick_6": [-0.30, 0.20, 0.91],
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/Baseplate"],
)
extension_notes: Construction/DIY canonical. Sequential placement: each subsequent brick must be placed on top of previous. Tests ordered drop_targets + multi-step trajectory.
failure_modes: Brick placement order matters — controller may pick bricks out of order
Stacked bricks may topple if alignment isn't precise
drop_targets z=0.81/0.86/0.91 require reach beyond drop_target; cuRobo may refuse if 3D check rejects upper-tier
Target_path is Baseplate — bricks above baseplate but in baseplate xy still count for any-cube success
